title: Uncommon Netherite
description: Netherite's rarity attribute has been changed to uncommon, giving the item names a yellow shine!
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components) ⚠️**

# ⭐ Uncommon Netherite
- **Cosmetic change** that gives Netherite Equipment yellow names, to make them stand out more
- **Compatible with vanilla clients**, without any disparity
